summary: Offline resilience polish complete. useOnlineStatus hook tracks navigator.onLine via event listeners. OfflineBanner shows on groups page when offline, auto-redisplays on connectivity changes. syncQueue.ts provides localStorage-backed queue (max 50 items) for failed score syncs. MarmotContext drains queue on window 'online' event. publishScoreUpdate enqueues on failure for retry. 10 unit tests for syncQueue.
